active_task: PR #79 merged 2026-07-13 (e6cd860 via Jules auto-merge of d75d616 + ad7ebc3 rest delta): session-scoped lead attribution (UTM incl. term/content, external referrer origin, landing_page, form_path, server-derived attribution_channel) captured in sessionStorage hsb-attribution-v1, endpoint re-sanitizes as trust boundary (allowlist, formula-prefix strip, same-origin referrer drop, tolerant error semantics), privacy notice section added. 74/74 tests. Production deploy of ad7ebc3 dispatched 2026-07-13. Remaining: Apps-Script column mapping for new attribution keys (connector gate), apex DNS (All-Inkl), GBP verification, cold-outreach compliance gate.

website_code_diff_lines: local changes present: references, GA/Astro hint fix, CRM lead import docs, truth docs
completed_steps: Phase 3 is backed by local Lighthouse evidence from 2026-06-26 with Performance 95, Accessibility 100, Best Practices 100, and SEO 100.

Phase 4 is closed for materials, channel decision, and owner approval scope: j-cherino@hsb-boden.de is canonical for flyer/mail outreach, info@hsb-boden.de remains the general/legal mailbox, and Outlook is historical fallback only.
CRM-Light is documented as template-ready for future lead import and the Phase 7 compliance/import gate documents define the blocked manual outreach path.
Phase 12 remains current but externally blocked by the pending NS/DNS switch.
Workflow risks fixed (commit a28fbb2): CI SHA-pinned, deploy-production.yml workaround applied.
Max-readiness doc sweep (2026-06-26 Tier 1): 7 new canonical readiness docs created, FINAL_CLOUDFLARE_WORKERS_READINESS_AUDIT converted to historical wrapper, all cross-references updated.

Final pre-go-live documentation wave (2026-06-26 Tier 2): 12 new detailed readiness docs created across cloudflare/, analytics/, email/, assets/, crm/, automation/, ops/, launch/. All Tier-1 canonical docs updated with cross-references. PROJECT_TRUTH.md, CHECKPOINT_STATE.json, FINAL_OPERATOR_HANDOFF.md, MASTER_EXECUTION_PLAN.md updated.

Cloudflare Pages www live verification (2026-07-08): https://www.hsb-boden.de/referenzen/ returns HTTP 200 and includes corrected references KESSLER-ZINK GmbH, Weingut Dohlmühle-Genussreich, and Flonheim.

Phase 7 lead import preparation extended for two operators: Joel Cherino Diaz and Jordi Post each get about 2,500 addresses when data volume allows; flyer attachment field is required before dispatch.

Lead attribution end-to-end (PR #79, 2026-07-13): 4 OpenAI review rounds all fixed, Codex privacy finding fixed, Playwright E2E proof without real lead; docs/crm/CRM_LIGHT_MAX_READINESS.md documents CRM mapping + connector gate.
workflow_risks_fixed: deploy-production.yml: replaced 'deploy --env production' with 'deploy --name hsb-boden --var ENVIRONMENT:production' per PHASE_C_CUTOVER_RUNBOOK.md
open_steps: Apps-Script connector: map new payload keys utm_term/utm_content/referrer/landing_page/form_path/attribution_channel to CRM columns (owner/connector gate).
Consolidate the Pages migration worktree hsb-boden-pages-static into main after explicit approval, so there is no second code truth.
Resolve apex hsb-boden.de: it currently serves WordPress/Apache and /referenzen/ returns 404; decide and approve redirect to www or equivalent DNS/hosting change.
If DNS or redirect changes are approved, follow the updated Phase 12 section in docs/MASTER_EXECUTION_PLAN.md before touching Cloudflare or provider DNS.
Pre-DNS: activate M365 DKIM for j-cherino@hsb-boden.de per docs/email/EMAIL_ROUTING_AND_DELIVERABILITY_MAX_READINESS.md.
If lead data becomes available, follow docs/crm/CRM_LIGHT_MAX_READINESS.md and docs/launch/LEAD_IMPORT_5000_CHECKLIST.md.
Keep dispatch blocked until real lead data, recipient basis, opt-out handling, and batch approval exist.
Use docs/launch/PRE_DNS_GO_LIVE_MAX_CHECKLIST.md as historical trigger-day evidence, but treat docs/MASTER_EXECUTION_PLAN.md and PROJECT_TRUTH.md as current truth.
blocked_by: Apex hsb-boden.de still points to WordPress/Apache instead of the Pages www live path.
The Pages migration branch/worktree is not yet consolidated into main.
The future 5,000-lead dataset is not inserted yet.
pre_outreach_blockers: M365 DKIM for j-cherino@hsb-boden.de not yet activated.
Recipient basis and batch approval are still missing until real lead data exists.
next_step: Read docs/launch/PRE_DNS_GO_LIVE_MAX_CHECKLIST.md and docs/handoff/JOEL_JORDI_OPERATOR_RUNBOOK.md for resume order. If neither external input exists, stop.
